narrative:
Put-In-Bay 1 (Put-In-Bay) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 682 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a clear Republican lean of 11.0 percentage points.
